subject: You are in. Here is what happens next.
body:
Hey Justin,

Your seat is confirmed for the AIOS Workshop this Wednesday, February 25 (11am ET / 4pm GMT / 8am PT).

Three things to do right now:

1 ADD IT TO YOUR CALENDAR
Wednesday, Feb 25 - 11am ET - 4pm GMT - 8am PT

2 JOIN AIOS GROUND ZERO ON TELEGRAM
My raw daily channel - what me, my friends and my Accelerator members are building into AIOS, tips, templates, voice notes, workshop clips. This is sauce live from the frontier of modern business.
Most content disappears in 24 hours. I will be dropping value there for business owners daily.

3 YOU ARE NOW GETTING THE AIOS SIGNAL
Starting now, you will get one short email from me every day summarizing my learnings and insights from Telegram - all you need to keep up with where AI is going and what it means for your business.
Think of it as the one thing you read each day to stay on top of this. No fluff - just signal.

What happens next:
- Daily drops in Ground Zero (Telegram) - active NOW!
- The AIOS Signal in your inbox - daily
- Your Zoom link - sent the morning of the workshop
- A reminder - 30 minutes before we go live via email and SMS

This is not a normal webinar. I am going to show you the exact AI system running my 4 businesses - and give you the blueprint to build yours.

See you Wednesday.

- Liam
